column1: Opposite her was an ordinary-looking man wearing ________________
I killed her and ____________ her body in the grass.
In a corner of the room by __________ sat Sergent Grant.
Out of the corner of her eye Logan could see Grant shaking his head slowly ___________

What did she look like? asked Logan.

"She was _______________ "said Billy Marr very definitely, still looking Logan straight in the eyes.

"How exactly did you kill her?"

"Like I said, with ________________", he said.
"I put my hands round _____________ and pressed and pressed."
He came into the London Road police station once every couple of ___________ or so to tell the police about something he had done.

There was some surprise in his voice. 

"You're not keeping me in then?"

"No, Billy", said Logan. We're letting you __________.
"There aren't ______________ on your face or hands ......" said Logan.
I didn't want  _________ him again until well after Christmas."
They've _________ the body of young woman on Calton Hill.
